commodities.title: Midmorning Market: Ebbing Production Provides Natural Gas Price Support
commodities.description: While still robust by seasonal and historical standards, natural gas production continues to taper from recent record high levels even as export demand runs near capacity. The pullback has helped to put a floor beneath futures in the heart of shoulder season.
